articles.title: Rohit and Santner miss out for Mumbai Indians against Punjab Kings
articles.description: Mumbai Indians brought in Quinton de Kock for his first game of the season

articles.title: SRH's David Payne ruled out of IPL 2026 with ankle injury
articles.description: The English seamer had played only their first two games of the season

articles.title: Khaleel Ahmed ruled out of IPL 2026 with quadricep injury
articles.description: Khaleel suffered the injury during CSK's previous game against KKR

articles.title: MI sign Krish Bhagat as injured Atharva Ankolekar's replacement
articles.description: The Punjab seamer is yet to play T20s, but has impressed the MI management as a support bowler in the build-up to the IPL 2026 season

articles.title: Cummins cleared for IPL return, targeting late April comeback
articles.description: SRH's captain returned to Australia for scans which have provided positive news on his back injury

articles.title: Karachi Kings sign Jason Roy as replacement for Muhammad Waseem
articles.description: Waseem and Khuzaima bin Tanveer have been called up by UAE for national duty

articles.title: RCB top the table after bowlers help thump LSG
articles.description: Rasikh Salam bagged four, Bhuvneshwar three, Krunal two and Hazlewood one

articles.title: Rubel Hossain announces international retirement
articles.description: He played the last of his 159 international games in April 2021

articles.title: Stokes: Talk of rift with McCullum is 'massive overstatement'
articles.description: England captain uses in-house media to break lengthy silence and reaffirm partnership with head coach

articles.title: PSL imposes a two-year ban on Muzarabani
articles.description: He had pulled out his PSL deal with Islamabad United to play for KKR in the IPL instead

articles.title: Mitchell Starc, Deepti Sharma named as Wisden's Leading Cricketers in the World
articles.description: Four Indians among Five Cricketers of Year in latest edition of Wisden Cricketers' Almanack

articles.title: ICC increases total prize pool for Women's T20 World Cup by 10%
articles.description: The increase stems largely from the expansion from a 10 to 12-team competition, and an increase in group-stage matches from 20 to 30

articles.title: RR manager Bhinder caught on camera using mobile phone in team dugout
articles.description: BCCI secretary Devajit Saikia told PTI that the board would be conducting an "internal investigation" and "reviewing the video footage"

articles.title: Pathirana granted NOC by Sri Lanka Cricket to join KKR
articles.description: The news will come as a boost to KKR, who are at the bottom on the IPL points table after failing to win even one of their four games so far

articles.title: Mumbai Cricket Association introduces grade-based salary contracts for domestic players
articles.description: They become the first Indian state body to introduce player contracts

articles.title: Vinod Kambli's health deteriorates, friend creates WhatsApp group to raise funds for medical bills
articles.description: The former Indian batter was hospitalised in early 2025 due to a clot in his brain.

articles.title: PSL 2026: Karachi Kings replace Muhammad Waseem with England's Jason Roy
articles.description: The Karachi Kings are currently fourth in the PSL standings after picking up six points from five matches. They won their first three games of the season before suffering two consecutive defeats.
